title: Funding Rate Directional Parameters
description: Input parameter schema for funding_rate_directional alpha signal.

funding_rates.description: Funding rate array (as decimal, e.g. 0.0001 = 1 bps).

funding_threshold_bps_long.description: Long threshold in bps (trigger if avg_funding < -this).

funding_threshold_bps_short.description: Short threshold in bps (trigger if avg_funding > +this).

basis_filter_bps.description: Max residual in bps before marking signal neutral.

lookback_hours.description: Hours of lookback (must be >= 8, one 8h funding interval).
